counterfactuals.name: perfect_hindsight
counterfactuals.method: All 5 contracts sold at peak premium $4.32. In reality we scaled out at $2.26, $3.72, $4.32 — close to ideal.

counterfactuals.name: v14_doctrine
counterfactuals.method: v14: TP1 3× @ 2.17 (+30% fixed) + runner 2× exit @ ~3.80 (ribbon flip ~12:00 ET, fixed-PL +10% floor 1.84 not breached)

counterfactuals.name: stepped_pl
counterfactuals.method: HWM $4.01 = +140% gain → stepped rung 100-150% = 10% trail → floor $3.61. v15 trailing 20% floor was $3.21. Stepped would have offered $0.40/contract MORE protection, but target $4.18 fired before any trail floor was breached on either mode. Identical outcome TODAY. Differentiation on chop/retrace days.

evidence.method: Replays lib.filters.evaluate_bearish_setup + evaluate_bullish_setup (same engine as live heartbeat) over today's RTH bars. Each bar produces one EngineDecision with full filter scores + blockers + triggers.

detection.narrative: Phase 3 orchestrator-replay: 78 bars evaluated. Engine ENTERs: 5 | Actual trades: 2 | SKIPs: 49 | HOLDs: 24 | Verdict: OVER_AGGRESSIVE. engine produced 5 spurious ENTER(s) where no real trade fired. Would have churned the account.. Score 55/100.

details.rationale: Engine replay would have ENTERed 5 times today; actual trades = 2. Excess fires would churn the account.

edge.narrative: Captured $1,208 of $2,650 perfect-hindsight = 45.6% edge capture.  v14 doctrine would have delivered $1,153 — v15 OUTPERFORMED by $55.  T75 stepped-PL gives identical outcome on TODAY (+$0 delta) — differentiation visible on chop/retrace days.

details.note: v15 doctrine outperformed v14 on this trade. Strengthen confidence in v15 trailing PL + runner target.

Base analog-mean P&L (current v15 knobs): $+135.
Dominant knob: **strike_offset** (base=-2) — best level=-3 → analog-mean $+174 (Δ $+39 per analog).
Sensitivity ranking (Δmax across sweep range, per-analog mean):
  - strike_offset: ±$114.58 | best=-3 ($+174)
  - profit_lock_trail_pct: ±$22.5 | best=0.1 ($+157)
  - premium_stop_pct: ±$0.0 | best=-0.3 ($+135)
  - tp1_premium_pct: ±$0.0 | best=0.2 ($+135)
  - tp1_qty_fraction: ±$0.0 | best=0.3 ($+135)
  - runner_target_premium_pct: ±$0.0 | best=1.5 ($+135)
[Phase 2.6 caveat] Sensitivity computed on HISTORICAL analogs, not today's bar. Once 5/14 OPRA cache populates overnight, knob_round_trip can re-run on today directly.

[ORIGINAL today-bar attempt] Base P&L (actual realized): $+295. OPRA cache MISS for 2026-05-14 — simulator cannot run sweep on today's trade bar. This is expected on T+0 EOD: OPRA aggregation runs overnight; tomorrow's EodDeepDive can re-run knob sweep on today's bar once cache populates. For tonight, see forensics module's analog hit-rate as the closest available sensitivity proxy (3/3 historical analogs returned avg +$270 under current v15).
